subtitle: Feeding, vet visits & wellness for your cat

views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing today's feeding timeline, care streak, upcoming vet reminders, latest weight, and quick-add FAB. Top section shows a progress ring for daily feeding goal completion. Alert banners for overdue medications or vet visits.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Context-adaptive entry form. Selecting event type reveals only relevant fields — feeding shows food type/portions/eaten toggle, vet shows visit type/cost, medication shows medication type, weight check shows weight stepper. Mood and notes always visible.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Chronological log grouped by date with color-coded event type icons. Filter by event type. Each entry shows time, type icon, key detail (e.g. '2 portions wet food' or 'Vaccination - $85'). Swipe to delete.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Multi-section analytics: feeding frequency chart (bar chart by day), weight trend line chart, meal completion rate, feeding time consistency heatmap (shows if you feed at regular times), monthly cost breakdown by category, mood distribution pie chart, and AI-generated care insights.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayFeedingCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of feeding events logged today (excluding water)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayFeedingTimes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Timestamps of all feedings today for timeline display

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyFeedingGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Fraction of daily feeding goal met (todayFeedingCount / dailyFeedingGoal)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: mealCompletionRate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of feedings in last 7 days where wasEaten == true

viewModelComputedProperties.name: feedingConsistencyScore
viewModelComputedProperties.description: 0-100 score based on standard deviation of feeding times across days — lower variance = higher score

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyFeedingAverage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average number of feedings per day over the past 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: feedingTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Compares this week's avg feedings to last week's — returns 'increasing', 'stable', or 'decreasing'

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentWeight
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Most recent weightGrams entry, nil if no weight checks recorded

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weightTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Array of (date, weightGrams) tuples for line chart, last 90 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weightChangePercent
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percent change between two most recent weight checks — flags >5% as concerning

viewModelComputedProperties.name: lastVetVisitDate
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Date of most recent vet visit event

viewModelComputedProperties.name: daysSinceLastVetVisit
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Days elapsed since last vet visit — shows alert banner if > 365

viewModelComputedProperties.name: careStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least one feeding logged

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyVetCosts
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of costCents for vet visits this calendar month

viewModelComputedProperties.name: moodDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of each mood value over last 30 days for pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: overdueCareAlerts
viewModelComputedProperties.description: List of alert messages: overdue vet checkup (>12mo), overdue flea/tick med (>30d), no feeding today, significant weight change

viewModelComputedProperties.name: feedingsByHour
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Dictionary of hour (0-23) to feeding count for time-of-day heatmap

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyChartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 7 days of (dayLabel, feedingCount) for bar chart

dailyGoal.description: Target number of meals per day (wet + dry food, excluding treats and water)

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if at least one feeding event (wet or dry food) is logged. Treats and water alone do not count. Streak resets if a full calendar day passes with zero qualifying feedings.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Track three key trends: (1) Feeding regularity — compare standard deviation of daily feeding times this week vs last week; (2) Weight trajectory — linear regression on last 5 weight checks, flag if slope suggests >10% annual change; (3) Appetite — compare meal completion rate (wasEaten) this week vs 4-week rolling average, flag >20% drop as potential health concern.
insights: Feeding schedule consistency — 'You feed most consistently around 8am and 6pm. Thursday tends to be irregular.'
Appetite change detection — 'Meal completion dropped from 90% to 60% this week. Consider a vet check if this persists.'
Weight milestone alerts — 'Weight increased 8% over the last 3 months (4.2kg → 4.5kg). Healthy range for domestic cats is 3.6–4.5kg.'
Vet visit reminders — 'Last checkup was 11 months ago. Annual wellness exams are recommended.'
Medication schedule tracking — 'Last flea & tick treatment was 28 days ago. Most treatments are monthly.'
Cost summary — 'You spent $245 on vet care this quarter, down from $310 last quarter.'
Mood correlation — 'Your cat tends to be lethargic on days with fewer than 2 meals logged. Ensure consistent feeding.'
